summary: Senior Lead Data Engineer with over 20 years of experience in designing and delivering robust data engineering solutions, specializing in Big Data Technologies and Cloud Computing. Proficient in Python, SQL, and AWS, with hands-on expertise in Spark, Hadoop, and data warehousing solutions like Snowflake and Redshift. Skilled in Agile methodologies, I excel in leading cross-functional teams to implement scalable cloud-based architectures on platforms such as Azure and Google Cloud. My background in full-stack development and distributed microservices ensures high-performance solutions for enterprise environments. I am eager to contribute to Capital One by driving innovative data strategies that empower financial solutions for millions of customers.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Developed an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python and SQL, integrating Claude Code and Grok (xAI) for automation. Implemented semantic duplicate detection with FAISS vector embeddings, enhancing job scoring and tailoring accuracy. Built multi-step workflows for resume/cover letter generation and quality gating, aligning with Agile practices for iterative improvement.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Engineered an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, and Spark, replacing manual processes and reducing cycles by 90%. Developed Prophet and scikit-learn models to predict bottlenecks 6 months ahead, supporting scalable data solutions. Created a Streamlit dashboard for real-time insights, aligning with Agile delivery for stakeholder feedback.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform on AWS using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock for enterprise-scale ETL processes. Built a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet, optimizing data access and query performance. Resolved small file issues with Snappy and Parquet compression, enhancing compatibility with Redshift and Snowflake architectures.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining of user performance metrics using Dynatrace to optimize critical systems. Focused on identifying bottlenecks to improve throughput, aligning with Agile optimization cycles. Delivered actionable insights for system enhancements in a collaborative environment.
